problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
hypothesis: Quantum tunneling through energy barrier may resolve Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
